name: JoinRequestValidator

neutralConcepts: 3 reads before any write: group exists, user not banned, not already member
distinct error codes: GROUP_NOT_FOUND, USER_BANNED, ALREADY_MEMBER, INVALID_INVITE_TOKEN
ALREADY_MEMBER checks both ACTIVE and PENDING status

ironRules.rule: Three reads before any write: (1) group exists check, (2) user ban check, (3) ALREADY_MEMBER check (covers ACTIVE+PENDING).
Distinct error codes required: GROUP_NOT_FOUND, USER_BANNED, ALREADY_MEMBER, INVALID_INVITE_TOKEN. VALIDATION_FAILURE must never be returned.
ALREADY_MEMBER check covers both ACTIVE and PENDING status — not just ACTIVE.

keywords: join request validator distinct error codes GROUP_NOT_FOUND USER_BANNED ALREADY_MEMBER INVALID_INVITE_TOKEN
